title: One-on-One: Vinnie Micciche and Michael Donovan
summary: Vinnie Micciche and Michael Donovan discussed Christina's proposed flat fee for newsletter work, which Michael Donovan found reasonable despite viewing the hourly rate as high. Vinnie Micciche expressed frustration with Michael Donovan's unfinished tasks and lack of clear communication regarding health issues or workload prioritization, contrasting this with Michael Donovan's focus on other projects like the Viconic website, which Vinnie Micciche wants Michael Donovan to stop working on until Perry provides clear direction due to Perry's frequent changes and complex requests. The conversation escalated to Vinnie Micciche questioning Michael Donovan's execution, leading to Vinnie Micciche suggesting that they need to separate, offering Michael Donovan a consulting role, and requesting Michael Donovan send a document detailing the constant changes Perry has made to the Viconic website.

decisions.description: Christina's flat fee for newsletter work is reasonable.
Michael to stop Viconic website work until Perry gives clear direction.
Vinnie suggests separating from Michael, offering a consulting role.

actionItems.task: Prepare document outlining Perry's Viconic site changes timeline.

expectedOutcome.description: Clear timeline of Perry's Viconic website changes.

actionItems.task: Send social posts for review with captions in Google doc.

expectedOutcome.description: Social posts with captions for Vinnie's review.

actionItems.task: Provide estimated timeframe for website pages design and build deliverables.

expectedOutcome.description: Timeline for website design and build deliverables.

actionItems.task: Work up a plan for transition to consulting role.

expectedOutcome.description: Transition plan for Michael Donovan's responsibilities.

contributions.description: Proposed flat fee for newsletter is reasonable despite high hourly rate.
Michael needs to prioritize and deliver on Vinnie's requests.
Michael must communicate health issues or workload to Vinnie.
Michael should stop Viconic work until Perry gives clear direction.
Built Viconic site using basic copywriting methodology as a starting point.
Focus on specific direction and delivery, avoid recreating new methods.
Values velocity and speed, prefers quick execution, fixing messes later.
